_publications._publicationTitle: Inhibition of YAP/TAZ-driven TEAD activity prevents growth of NF2-null schwannoma and meningioma.

_contextSnippet: Compared to control nerves, ALDH1A1 protein expression was elevated in the sciatic nerves of NF2-null mice... Analysis of human schwannoma showed strong ALDH1A1 expression in all tumours (n = 10), with no expression in control (sural) nerve
details: Successfully detected elevated ALDH1A1 expression in NF2-null mouse tissue in sciatic nerve and DRG, and showed strong expression in all human schwannoma tumors with no expression in control nerve
